detailed_description: This video directly showcases a FluffCo pillow, emphasizing its plush comfort and potential to alleviate neck pain. A hand gently presses the soft, white pillow, allowing viewers to visually appreciate its texture and quality. The overlaid text acts as a clear call to action, positioning FluffCo as the solution for a pain-free morning, leveraging direct product interaction with a clear benefit statement.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment is the Semantic Core. It directly features the product (FluffCo pillow), shows clear human interaction with it (hand touching/feeling its softness), and delivers the primary message and call to action via the text overlay ('get FluffCo and wake up without neck pain'). There is no setup, post-action dead air, or extraneous footage; the action is continuous and focused.
